parameters.content:
## AG_11 — Project State Manager

**Purpose:** Persistent project state across ChatGPT GPT sessions.

### Manual Setup Required
1. Create credential → Postgres → name it exactly: **DATABASE_CONNECTION**
2. Enter your Postgres/Supabase host, port, db, user, password
3. Run the schema SQL shown in the second sticky note
4. Set this workflow **Active**

### Endpoints (all POST)
- /ag/project/create-or-resume
- /ag/project/state
- /ag/project/save-step-result
- /ag/project/mark-step-failed
- /ag/project/get-next-step
- /ag/project/latest-snapshot

### Called by
AG_00 calls these endpoints via HTTP Request nodes.
Custom GPT can also call /latest-snapshot and /state directly.

## Required DB Tables — Run Once

```sql
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ag_projects (
  project_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  title TEXT,
  status TEXT DEFAULT 'active',
  latest_run_id TEXT,
  current_step TEXT,
  last_completed_step TEXT,
  next_action TEXT DEFAULT 'start',
  last_summary TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ag_runs (
  run_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  project_id TEXT REFERENCES ag_projects(project_id),
  status TEXT DEFAULT 'processing',
  current_step TEXT,
  last_completed_step TEXT,
  next_action TEXT,
  retry_count INT DEFAULT 0,
  error TEXT,
  started_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ag_step_results (
  step_result_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  run_id TEXT, project_id TEXT,
  step_name TEXT, status TEXT,
  summary TEXT,
  structured_output JSONB DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
  risks JSONB DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb,
  assumptions JSONB DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb,
  blocking_questions JSONB DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ag_project_logs (
  log_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  project_id TEXT, run_id TEXT,
  event_type TEXT, step_name TEXT,
  message TEXT, payload JSONB DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ag_artifacts (
  artifact_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  project_id TEXT, run_id TEXT,
  artifact_type TEXT, title TEXT,
  content TEXT, version_label TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);
```

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO ag_projects (project_id, title, status, next_action, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES ('{{ $json.project_id }}', '{{ $json.title }}', 'active', 'start', '{{ $json.now }}', '{{ $json.now }}')
ON CONFLICT (project_id) DO UPDATE SET updated_at = '{{ $json.now }}'
RETURNING *

WITH existing AS (
  SELECT run_id FROM ag_runs
  WHERE project_id = '{{ $('Code - Prepare Create Resume').first().json.project_id }}'
    AND status = 'processing'
  ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 1
),
inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO ag_runs (run_id, project_id, status, started_at)
  SELECT '{{ $('Code - Prepare Create Resume').first().json.run_id }}',
         '{{ $('Code - Prepare Create Resume').first().json.project_id }}',
         'processing',
         '{{ $('Code - Prepare Create Resume').first().json.now }}'
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM existing)
  RETURNING run_id
)
SELECT COALESCE(
  (SELECT run_id FROM existing),
  (SELECT run_id FROM inserted)
) AS actual_run_id,
((SELECT run_id FROM existing) IS NOT NULL) AS reused

UPDATE ag_projects
SET latest_run_id = '{{ $('Postgres - Insert Run').first().json.actual_run_id }}', updated_at = NOW()
WHERE project_id = '{{ $('Code - Prepare Create Resume').first().json.project_id }}'
RETURNING *

SELECT p.project_id, p.title, p.status, p.latest_run_id,
  p.current_step, p.last_completed_step, p.next_action, p.last_summary,
  p.created_at, p.updated_at,
  r.run_id AS r_run_id, r.status AS r_status,
  r.current_step AS r_current_step, r.last_completed_step AS r_last_completed,
  r.next_action AS r_next_action, r.retry_count, r.error AS r_error,
  r.started_at, r.completed_at
FROM ag_projects p
LEFT JOIN ag_runs r ON r.run_id = p.latest_run_id
WHERE p.project_id = '{{ $json.project_id }}'

INSERT INTO ag_step_results (
  step_result_id,
  run_id,
  project_id,
  step_name,
  status,
  summary,
  structured_output,
  risks,
  assumptions,
  blocking_questions,
  created_at
)
SELECT
  '{{ $json.step_result_id }}',
  COALESCE(
    (SELECT run_id FROM ag_runs WHERE run_id = '{{ $json.run_id }}' LIMIT 1),
    (SELECT latest_run_id FROM ag_projects WHERE project_id = '{{ $json.project_id }}' AND latest_run_id IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1),
    '{{ $json.run_id }}'
  ),
  '{{ $json.project_id }}',
  '{{ $json.step_name }}',
  '{{ $json.status }}',
  '{{ $json.summary }}',
  '{{ $json.structured_output }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ $json.risks }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ $json.assumptions }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ $json.blocking_questions }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ $json.now }}'
RETURNING step_result_id, run_id;

UPDATE ag_runs
SET last_completed_step = '{{ $('Code - Prepare Save Step').first().json.step_name }}',
    current_step = '{{ $('Code - Prepare Save Step').first().json.step_name }}',
    status = '{{ $('Code - Prepare Save Step').first().json.status }}'
WHERE run_id = '{{ $input.first().json.run_id }}'
RETURNING run_id, status

UPDATE ag_projects
SET last_completed_step = '{{ $('Code - Prepare Save Step').first().json.step_name }}',
    current_step = '{{ $('Code - Prepare Save Step').first().json.step_name }}',
    last_summary = '{{ $('Code - Prepare Save Step').first().json.summary }}',
    updated_at = '{{ $('Code - Prepare Save Step').first().json.now }}'
WHERE project_id = '{{ $('Code - Prepare Save Step').first().json.project_id }}'
RETURNING project_id, status, next_action

INSERT INTO ag_project_logs (log_id, project_id, run_id, event_type, step_name, message, created_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Code - Prepare Save Step').first().json.log_id }}',
  '{{ $('Code - Prepare Save Step').first().json.project_id }}',
  '{{ $('Postgres - Insert Step Result').first().json.run_id }}',
  'step_saved',
  '{{ $('Code - Prepare Save Step').first().json.step_name }}',
  '{{ $('Code - Prepare Save Step').first().json.summary }}',
  '{{ $('Code - Prepare Save Step').first().json.now }}'
)

UPDATE ag_runs
SET status = '{{ $json.run_status }}',
    error = '{{ $json.error_msg }}',
    retry_count = {{ $json.retry_count }},
    next_action = '{{ $json.next_action }}',
    current_step = '{{ $json.step_name }}',
    completed_at = '{{ $json.now }}'
WHERE run_id = '{{ $json.run_id }}'
RETURNING run_id, status

UPDATE ag_projects
SET status = 'failed',
    current_step = '{{ $('Code - Prepare Mark Failed').first().json.step_name }}',
    next_action = '{{ $('Code - Prepare Mark Failed').first().json.next_action }}',
    updated_at = '{{ $('Code - Prepare Mark Failed').first().json.now }}'
WHERE project_id = '{{ $('Code - Prepare Mark Failed').first().json.project_id }}'
RETURNING project_id, status, next_action

INSERT INTO ag_project_logs (log_id, project_id, run_id, event_type, step_name, message, payload, created_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Code - Prepare Mark Failed').first().json.log_id }}',
  '{{ $('Code - Prepare Mark Failed').first().json.project_id }}',
  '{{ $('Code - Prepare Mark Failed').first().json.run_id }}',
  'step_failed',
  '{{ $('Code - Prepare Mark Failed').first().json.step_name }}',
  '{{ $('Code - Prepare Mark Failed').first().json.error_msg }}',
  '{}'::jsonb,
  '{{ $('Code - Prepare Mark Failed').first().json.now }}'
)

SELECT p.project_id, p.status, p.current_step, p.last_completed_step,
  p.next_action, p.latest_run_id,
  r.status AS r_status, r.next_action AS r_next_action,
  r.error, r.retry_count
FROM ag_projects p
LEFT JOIN ag_runs r ON r.run_id = p.latest_run_id
WHERE p.project_id = '{{ $json.project_id }}'

SELECT
  p.project_id, p.status, p.current_step, p.last_completed_step,
  p.next_action, p.latest_run_id,
  (
    SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('type', a.artifact_type, 'title', a.title, 'version', a.version_label))
    FROM (SELECT * FROM ag_artifacts WHERE project_id = p.project_id ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 3) a
  ) AS artifacts,
  (
    SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('step', s.step_name, 'status', s.status))
    FROM (SELECT * FROM ag_step_results WHERE project_id = p.project_id ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 3) s
  ) AS step_highlights
FROM ag_projects p
WHERE p.project_id = '{{ $json.project_id }}'
SELECT project_id, title, status, updated_at FROM ag_projects ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 50
